post.summary: This is a proxy call to the IdentityServer.
post.description:
**Do not use this call in your production code!**
Please get the token directly from the IdentityServer in your code.
This call is only intended for convenience when testing via Swagger.
            
The correct URL for production use is **https://oauth.vendit.online/Api/GetToken**
            
Tokens should be cached on the client side keeping note of the expiration date that comes with it (in UNIX Epoch format, seconds since 1-1-1970). Separate threads should share this token.
Different applications should have separate API-Keys.
            
Best practice is to assign different users to each API-key in order to get meaningful information out of audit logs (for example when an API consumer erroneously updates stock in some process).
Likewise, when multiple users use your application, assign each user a separate API-Key paired with the correct Employee in order to retain meaningful audit logs and journals.
            
For all other API calls, use the Http Headers **Token** and **ApiKey** for authentication.

get.summary: Get Contacts linked to an address
get.description:
This hierarchy applies to Customers, Addresses and Contacts: 
 - Customers
    - Addresses
       - Phones
       - Contacts
          - Phones
Some fields may be redundant on different levels, for example Addresses as well as Contacts can have an e-mail address.

get.summary: Get the order including all products and down payments
get.description:
The StockStatusEnum on OrderDetails can be used for generic multi-tenant automation and should be one of:
  • 0 Error (Onbekend)
  • 1 OK (Not a stock-registered product)
  • 2 NoStock (Red: No Stock, nothing reserved)
  • 3 PartialInStock (Yellow: Partially Reserved/ready)
  • 4 InStock (Green: All reserved or enough stock)
  • 5 NotActivated (Blue: Not activated)

get.description:
The EnumValue can be used for generic multi-tenant automation and should be one of:
  • 0 Unknown
  • 1 New
  • 2 Processing (in behandeling)
  • 3 Products ordered
  • 4 Stock Reserved
  • 5 Ready
  • 6 Not activated
  • 7 Partially extradited
  • 8 Extradited
  • 9 Invoiced
  • 10 Processing Locked
  • 11 Drop-shipment manual
  • 12 Picking
  • 13 Picked
  • 14 Picked Incomplete

get.summary: Gets all attributes belonging to the product
Get all possible attributes that can belong to a product
Get Barcodes belonging to a product
Returns sales prices of the specified product

parameters.name: sizeColorId
parameters.description: (optional) Size-Color Id, if left 0 prices for multiple size-color's will be returned where deviating prices are defined.

parameters.name: officeId
parameters.description: (optional) Office ID, if 0 (default) then the office assigned to the API-key will be used, if -1 prices for all offices will be returned.

get.summary: Returns purchase prices of the specified product, note that GetSuppliers includes this info together with the supplier order numbers

parameters.name: sizeColorId
parameters.description: (optional) Size-Color Id, if left 0 prices for multiple size-color's will be returned where deviating prices are defined.

parameters.name: officeId
parameters.description: (optional) Office ID, if 0 (default) then the office assigned to the API-key will be used, if -1 prices for all offices will be returned.

field.description:
Description

Note: a few of the stock related fields depend on the office. It is possible to specify the desired office by adding a querystring.
?officeId=0
Will use the office bound to the used API-key (default, same as not specifying any officeId)
?officeId=-1
Will aggregate all stock of all offices
?officeId=3
Will use stock of office with ID=3
